response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided lyrics for '今日も大天才っ！'. The video contains a long instrumental intro which I have left unsubtitled as per the 'vocal audio drives timing' rule. Subtitles begin with the first vocal at 03:59. I have also transcribed the live MC segment (04:10-04:21) and the backup vocal bubbles ('大優勝', '中毒', etc.) as they are prominent audio-visual events.

subtitles.original: 今日も大天才っ！
subtitles.english: Today is also a great genius!

subtitles.original: だーいてんさいっ！
subtitles.english: Great genius!

subtitles.original: (大優勝 中毒 重症)
subtitles.english: (Big victory, Addiction, Serious condition)

subtitles.original: 今日も大天才っ！
subtitles.english: Today is also a great genius!

subtitles.original: だーいてんさいっ！
subtitles.english: Great genius!

subtitles.original: あ〜 ずっともっと 推し事させてっ
subtitles.english: Ah~ forever more, let me do the work of a fan!

subtitles.original: ね？
subtitles.english: Okay?

subtitles.original: 今日は莉々華の生誕祭ライブ！
subtitles.english: Today is Ririka's Birthday Celebration Live!

subtitles.original: 見に来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to see me!

subtitles.original: たくさんのゲストと プロジェクトいっぱい歌うからね！
subtitles.english: I'll be singing a lot from the project with many guests!

subtitles.original: 盛り上がっていこー！
subtitles.english: Let's get hyped up!

subtitles.original: アクスタ 痛バ ぬい 準備万端！
subtitles.english: Acrylic stands, itabag, plushies, all ready!

subtitles.original: オシャレも気合入れちゃって
subtitles.english: Getting all dressed up and fired up,

subtitles.original: 誰の為なの〜？
subtitles.english: Who is it for...?

subtitles.original: 狙うことなき推しの為です！
subtitles.english: It's for my oshi, without a doubt!

subtitles.original: 古参 新参も 人権は平等
subtitles.english: Old fans, new fans, everyone's equal here.

subtitles.original: 内に秘めた古参マウント
subtitles.english: An old-fan flex hidden deep inside...

subtitles.original: Not 同担拒否ですが
subtitles.english: I don't reject fans of the same oshi, but...

subtitles.original: すごーし嫉妬はするかも…
subtitles.english: I might get a little bit jealous...

subtitles.original: いいねボタン足りません…
subtitles.english: The like button isn't enough...

subtitles.original: これ無料でいいんですか？
subtitles.english: Is it really okay to watch this for free?

subtitles.original: 日々好きが募る
subtitles.english: My love grows every day,

subtitles.original: 尊すぎるでしょ… 困っちゃうなぁ
subtitles.english: you're too precious... It's troublesome.

subtitles.original: 今日も大天才っ！
subtitles.english: Today is also a great genius!

subtitles.original: だーいてんさいっ！
subtitles.english: Great genius!

subtitles.original: 推し出し惜しみ無理絶対 考えたくもないなぁ
subtitles.english: Holding back my support? Absolutely impossible, can't even imagine it.

subtitles.original: 生き甲斐
subtitles.english: My reason for living!
